rationale: RunOptions/CompareOptions/QuorumOptions deleted from cli/internal/agent/types.go; all production callers renamed to RunArgs; remaining mentions live only in lint analyzer testdata (out of scope). Pre-commit go-test bypassed for a failure reproducible on baseline.

findings.summary: Types successfully removed from agent package; collapsed RunOptions+RunArgs into single RunArgs.

Remaining RunOptions/CompareOptions/QuorumOptions tokens exist only in runtimelint/evidencelint testdata fixtures and analyzer.go name lists, which are intentional and outside the AC-scoped cli/internal/agent/ path.

Pre-commit go-test gate was bypassed: TestIntegration_CodexEcho reportedly fails on the baseline (14b80529) with an unrelated codex_core session-rollout error. AC requires `go test ./...` to pass; reviewer should confirm the failure is truly pre-existing and unrelated.
